philosophy: The design must feel like a premium data platform, not a standard resume. Use high-contrast clarity, technical aesthetics, and architectural visualizations.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-12). Use 'The Control Room Grid' for technical data (Skills, Experience). Asymmetry for Hero.
layout_and_spacing.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 with 1px delicate inner stroke border-white/20 dark:border-white/10. Sticky at top.
layout_and_spacing.cards: Subtle border (border-border), no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color darkens/glows. Grid Layout: Direct Children Only.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous. p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers.

components.experience_counter: Monospace digits (JetBrains Mono), pulsing accent indicator, technical readout aesthetic. Auto-updating Years, Months, Days.
components.skills_grid: Bento-style layout using CSS Grid. Use Shadcn badges for individual skills (Databricks, PySpark, etc.).
components.chatbot_widget: Floating glassmorphism terminal window at bottom right. Toggles open/close. Message interface minimalist.
components.resume_modal: Shadcn Dialog component presenting a PDF preview (iframe/embed) with a primary Download button.
components.contact_form: Shadcn Form (Input, Textarea, Button). Left-aligned. Clear validation.

animations.general: Smooth transitions. hover:transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.
animations.scroll: Use Lenis for premium smooth momentum scrolling.
animations.hero: Framer Motion staggered entrance for text. Subtle floating animation for profile/background.

hero_background.description: Abstract data engineering pipeline visualization. Overlay with bg-black/60 (dark) or bg-white/40 (light).

experience_background.description: Medallion architecture visualization for the Experience/Projects sections.

general_texture.description: Dark blue grain noise texture for dark mode backgrounds.

icons.usage: Use strictly 24px or 20px icons, stroke-width 1.5 or 2.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement pure HTML+Tailwind for major layouts. Use Shadcn UI specifically for interactive elements like inputs, dialogs, buttons.
Ensure Dark/Light mode toggle works via Tailwind's 'dark' class strategy. Default to dark mode on first load.
Build the live experience counter to calculate exact years, months, and days since July 04, 2022. Update dynamically.
Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations (staggered cards, fading text).
The AI Chatbot widget (DE Career Assistant) must be powered by Gemini 3 Flash API. Restrict prompt to resume-based answers only.
ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button', data-testid='theme-toggle').
Include the 3 detailed projects exactly: Servicer Data Onboarding/Medallion, US Banking Data Integration, Mutual Fund Automation.
Ensure 80vh mobile height limit on images.
